headline: What Makes Global Payments (GPN) a New Strong Buy Stock
summary: Global Payments (GPN) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
